changes.feedbackRef: A → negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → No wild sheet of flame
changes.before: No wild sheet of flame. Separate burns.
changes.after: Separate burns.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → wrong sweetness waited
changes.before: Burned now, charred and bitter, but under it the same wrong sweetness that had ridden out of Andorhal in sacks and carts and ordinary kitchens, patient enough to wait for ovens and hands and hunger to do half the work for it.
changes.after: Burned now, charred and bitter, but under it the same wrong sweetness that had ridden out of Andorhal in sacks and carts and ordinary kitchens, lying dormant until ovens and hands and hunger did half the work for it.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → separate fires as argument
changes.before: The separate fires below were the argument against that faith.
changes.after: Below her, the separate fires made that faith impossible.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → answer arriving too late
changes.before: The answer arriving too late.
changes.after: She had understood too late.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → body knew the weight
changes.before: Her body took the center-left weight it knew from the run into Stratholme.
changes.after: She settled into the center-left balance she knew from the run into Stratholme.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → North sat
changes.before: North sat in the dispatch tube, in her notebook, in the salt wind ahead.
changes.after: The dispatch tube, her notebook, and the salt wind ahead all pointed north.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → Evening put the road into the body
changes.before: Evening put the road into the body by force.
changes.after: By evening, the road was bodily fact.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → Full dark took the road
changes.before: Full dark took the road.
changes.after: The road disappeared into full dark.

changes.feedbackRef: A → negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → Not likeness. Capacity.
changes.before: Not likeness. Capacity.
changes.after: She was not like them. The fear was simpler: she could keep following a line too far.

changes.feedbackRef: A → negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → Not because she wanted none of it
changes.before: Not because she wanted none of it. Because wanting it all at once was so violent it nearly folded her over the saddle.
changes.after: Wanting it all at once was so violent it nearly folded her over the saddle.

changes.feedbackRef: B → gpt-5-prose-issues.md → She had not seen them clearly at first from this height.
changes.before: She had not seen them clearly at first from this height. Only pale. Bare.
changes.after: At first, from this height, only pale. Bare.

changes.feedbackRef: B → gpt-5-prose-issues.md → Jaina watched those things and kept descending.
changes.before: Jaina watched those things and kept descending.
changes.after: She kept descending.

changes.feedbackRef: B → gpt-5-prose-issues.md → That almost made her laugh.
changes.before: That almost made her laugh. The sound rose, found nothing in itself worth becoming, and died.
changes.after: A sound rose, found nothing in itself worth becoming, and died.

changes.feedbackRef: B → gpt-5-prose-issues.md → It suited the word.
changes.before: It suited the word.
changes.after: [deleted]

changes.feedbackRef: B → gpt-5-prose-issues.md → That was what made the turning happen.
changes.before: That was what made the turning happen.
changes.after: [deleted]

changes.feedbackRef: B → gpt-5-prose-issues.md → For her mind, nothing had become simpler at all.
changes.before: For her mind, nothing had become simpler at all.
changes.after: [deleted]

changes.feedbackRef: B → narrator-seep-guide.md → The movement beneath them did not.
changes.before: The movement beneath them did not.
changes.after: [deleted]

changes.feedbackRef: B → narrator-seep-guide.md → Not likeness. Capacity.
changes.before: Not likeness. Capacity.
changes.after: She was not like them. The fear was simpler: she could keep following a line too far.

changes.feedbackRef: B → narrator-seep-guide.md → closest thing to mercy he could manage
changes.before: Antonidas let the answer stand, which was the closest thing to mercy he could manage.
changes.after: Antonidas let the answer stand.

changes.feedbackRef: B → narrator-seep-guide.md → turned pressure into geography
changes.before: Hearing the place named simply turned pressure into geography.
changes.after: Hearing Northrend named fixed the next road on the map.

changes.feedbackRef: B → phantom-concreteness-guide.md → The thing itself.
changes.before: The thing itself.
changes.after: The residue itself, left after too many bodies had answered at once.

changes.feedbackRef: B → phantom-concreteness-guide.md → The answer was now in what came after.
changes.before: The answer was now in what came after.
changes.after: What came after would show her more than the grain had.

changes.feedbackRef: B → phantom-concreteness-guide.md → The deeper thing showed itself only when it no longer mattered for Stratholme.
changes.before: The deeper thing showed itself only when it no longer mattered for Stratholme.
changes.after: The deeper pattern only showed itself once Stratholme was beyond saving.

changes.feedbackRef: B → phantom-concreteness-guide.md → turned pressure into geography
changes.before: Hearing the place named simply turned pressure into geography.
changes.after: Hearing Northrend named fixed the next road on the map.
